design_philosophy.name: BIQc Premium Cognition
core_principles: Unified Container Geometry: All sections must align to a central axis with consistent max-width.
Generous Breathing Room: Vertical spacing (py) is doubled compared to standard layouts.
Text Block Discipline: Reading width never exceeds 65 characters (max-w-2xl).
Left-Align Rigor: Even when the container is centered, the text block within acts as a solid, left-aligned unit.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-orange-500 font-mono

color_palette_constraints.rule: DO NOT INTRODUCE NEW COLORS. Use opacity variants of existing palette for depth.

Hero.container_class: relative z-10 pt-32 sm:pt-48 pb-20 sm:pb-32 px-6 sm:px-8
Hero.fix: Change body text container to 'max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full text-left'. Remove 'text-center' from the description paragraph.

Cognition_Stats.grid_class: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-x-12 gap-y-10 border-y py-10

Comparison_Section.grid_class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 lg:gap-12 max-w-5xl mx-auto

Value_Props_WIIFM.grid_class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

implementation_steps.instruction: Replace all `max-w-5xl`, `max-w-4xl`, `max-w-xl` (in section wrappers) with `max-w-7xl` to create a unified 'wide-screen' rail.
Wrap the Hero description text (`Meet BIQc...`, `Your Chief Agent...`) in a `div.max-w-2xl.mx-auto.w-full.text-left` to satisfy the 'Centered Headline, Left Body' requirement.
Update all section `py` values to `py-20 sm:py-32` for major sections and `py-16 sm:py-24` for secondary ones. No more random `py-10` or `pt-28`.
Ensure every `max-w-7xl` container has `px-6 sm:px-8 lg:px-12`.
